channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Shondra Summers-Armstrong discusses key issues in Las Vegas city council race
item.description: LAS VEGAS (KLAS) — Shondra Summers-Armstrong, currently serving as an Assemblywoman for District 6, is running for Las Vegas City Council, Ward 5.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump insults Detroit while campaigning in the city
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Former President Donald Trump criticized Detroit while delivering remarks to an economic group there on Thursday, saying the whole country would end up like the city if his Democratic opponent, Vice President Kamala Harris, is elected.
item.dc:creator: JOEY CAPPELLETTI and ISABELLA VOLMERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Battle to shore up bases remains as Election Day nears
item.description: Coming up Friday at noon, MPR News politics editor Brian Bakst and his guest talks about deadly conflicts in the Middle East and how those have factored into domestic politics. Plus, we follow up with two Generation Z voters about how they’re approaching the election.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst, Matthew Alvarez, and Ellie Roth, MPR News

item.title: A federal judge rejects a call to reopen voter registration in Georgia after Hurricane Helene
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — A federal judge said Thursday that she won't order the presidential battleground state of Georgia to reopen voter registration for November’s elections despite recent disruptions to registration caused by Hurricane Helene. U.S.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Biden tells Trump to 'get a life, man' and stop storm misinformation
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden on Thursday publicly admonished Donald Trump, telling his predecessor to “get a life, man” and try to help people impacted by a pair of devastating hurricanes rather than spreading misinformation about the federal response.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NJ assemblyman's car stolen, house broken into
item.description: HAZLET, N.J. (PIX11) - Video from the home where a New Jersey assemblyman is currently living shows alleged burglars break into the home and speed away with his personal car - complete with State Assembly plates.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Follow the Money: Understanding FEMA's disaster budget in Hurricane Milton aftermath
item.description: In the event of natural disasters, it can be hard to understand the money, including whether or not FEMA has sufficient funding to respond and if Congress will approve additional relief.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dem strategists fret Harris 'sugar high' is over: 'If you're not nervous, you're not paying attention'
item.description: Democratic strategists, including James Carville and David Axelrod, are calling on the Harris campaign to get more aggressive amid concerns her early momentum has waned.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Political storm: On Trump 'onslaught of lies,' Biden urges former president to 'get a life man'
item.description: There's no let up in the war of words between President Biden and former President Trump over the federal government's response to back-to-back dangerous hurricanes that slammed into the southeast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: U.S. inflation reaches lowest point in three years
item.description: Although inflation may be the lowest in three years, the White House says the war on high prices is not over.
item.dc:creator: Reshad Hudson, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Independent in key House race suspends campaign, saying he was 'pawn' in election fraud scheme
item.description: A congressional candidate who said he was tricked by Democrats into running as a spoiler in a competitive House race in Minnesota suspended his campaign Thursday and endorsed his Republican rival.
item.dc:creator: RYAN J. FOLEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mayorkas doubles down, hammers 'pernicious' misinformation amid FEMA criticism
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas is furiously pushing back against what he says is "pernicious" misinformation, sometimes spread deliberately, as the agency attempts to deliver relief.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Voters in key battleground states give Trump an edge over Harris on this top tier issue: poll
item.description: Former President Trump holds a comfortable lead over Vice President Kamala Harris on the issue of immigration, according to a new poll released this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: For Wisconsin Dems, a 2024 win in the battleground state is years in the making
item.description: Democrats are confident that the organizing infrastructure they have been building in Wisconsin could put Vice President Harris over the top on Nov. 5.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump's small-dollar donor fundraising is beset by confusion and fatigue
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump’s contributions from small-dollar donors have plummeted since his last bid for the White House, presenting the former president with a financial challenge as he attempts to keep pace with Democrats' fundraising machine.
item.dc:creator: DAN MERICA, AARON KESSLER and RICHARD LARDNER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: TD Bank to pay $3 billion in historic money-laundering settlement with the Justice Department
item.description: TD Bank will pay approximately $3 billion in a historic settlement with U.S. authorities who say the financial institution’s lax practices allowed significant money laundering over multiple years.
item.dc:creator: Lindsay Whitehurst, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Contentious exchanges over illegal immigration front and center in Arizona Senate debate
item.description: Democratic Rep. Ruben Gallego and GOP challenger Kari Lake clashed over illegal immigration and abortion in Wednesday's heated Arizona U.S. Senate debate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DeSantis fires back at Harris over hurricane response: 'She has no role in this process'
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis called out Vice President Kamala Harris for getting political in the response to hurricanes Helene and Milton on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris accepts invite to CNN town hall as another Trump debate appears unlikely
item.description: Vice President Harris has accepted an invitation from CNN to participate in a town hall on the network a week before Election Day, as it appears unlikely that former President Trump will agree to a second debate with her.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, NewsNation

item.title: Ethel Kennedy, widow of Robert F. Kennedy, dead at 96
item.description: The Kennedy family announced the passing of Ethel Kennedy, the widow to Robert F. Kennedy, on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris' struggles with Michigan's working-class voters provides opening for Trump, GOP
item.description: Republicans in Michigan and the rest of the "Blue Wall" states are hoping to capitalize on Vice President Kamala Harris' struggles among working class and union voters.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris, Trump in virtual dead heat in major swing states
item.description: Vice President Harris and former President Trump are nearly tied in the major swing states that will play a deciding role in the election, according to polling released Thursday by The Hill and Emerson College Polling.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 5 takeaways from the Arizona Senate debate
item.description: Rep. Ruben Gallego (D-Ariz.) and Republican candidate Kari Lake faced off in their only debate in the Arizona Senate race Wednesday, and the two contenders frequently traded barbs. Gallego and Lake, who are vying for retiring Sen.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Human Rights Campaign launching ad blitz for Harris, other Democrats
item.description: Human Rights Campaign (HRC) and its Equality Votes political action committee are launching a multimillion-dollar digital ad blitz aimed at reaching "equality voters" for the Harris-Walz ticket in key battleground states, the group announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Former Sen. Tim Johnson, the last Democrat to hold statewide office in South Dakota, dies at 77
item.description: Former Sen. Tim Johnson, a centrist who was the last Democrat to hold statewide office in South Dakota and who spent nearly three decades in Congress, has died.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Harris aims to help adult caregivers with Medicare benefit expansion
item.description: Vice President Harris on Tuesday introduced a new plan to expand Medicare benefits so that the program covers the costs of long-term home care for older Americans. The plan, formally announced on ABC’s “The View,” is aimed at helping the “sandwich generation” take care of their aging parents.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, NewsNation

item.title: Eric Adams appoints new first deputy mayor after Sheena Wright resigns
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – New York City Mayor Eric Adams has appointed a new first deputy mayor after Sheena Wright resigned from her position on Tuesday. Maria Torres-Springer, the deputy mayor of housing, economic development and workforce, was appointed to the position.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Cook Political Report shifts Wisconsin Senate race toward GOP
item.description: The Cook Political Report on Tuesday shifted the Wisconsin Senate race from "lean Democrat" to "toss up," handing Republican Eric Hovde a boost as he tries to unseat Sen. Tammy Baldwin (D-Wis.).
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Rafael Arroyo discusses wasteful spending, studio tax credits, and California's policies in Nevada
item.description: Rafael Arroyo, the Republican candidate running for Assembly District 41, joined Brian Loftis on the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide, outlining his vision and priorities as the election approaches.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump intends to use military to round up opponents: Michael Cohen
item.description: “The big warning that I want people to understand is when Donald Trump says something, stop sane washing it. Stop trying to make it into something which has some normalcy to it. What he says, he intends to do.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: GOP senator calls Trump special counsel filing 'a temper tantrum from a deranged fanatic'
item.description: Arkansas Sen. Tom Cotton (R) said in a Sunday interview that a recently unsealed filing from special counsel Jack Smith is “a temper tantrum from a deranged fanatic.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, Fox 5

item.title: It’s a close race for Michigan. These factors could decide it for Harris or Trump
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris needs to win back Michigan voters President Joe Biden looked poised to lose. Donald Trump’s appeal remains strong here, but he’s not without his own struggles.
item.dc:creator: Majd Al-Waheidi, MPR News

item.title: Trump's plan would add $4 trillion more to U.S. debt compared to Harris', analysis says
item.description: Neither former President Donald Trump nor Vice President Kamala Harris have plans to fix the national debt, risking "an eventual fiscal crisis," a budget nonprofit group found in its analysis.
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett, MPR News

item.title: Walz says he'll 'own up' when he misspeaks as the Democratic ticket steps up media interviews
item.description: The “Fox News Sunday” interview reflected a broader media blitz by presidential nominee Kamala Harris and Walz as the Democrats seek to garner public attention in the final 30 days of the campaign.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Ballots mailed out to registered voters for Presidential General Election
item.description: Registered voters in San Diego County will be receiving their ballots next week for the November Presidential General Election.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Trump returns to site of attempted assassination, honors shooting victims
item.description: Former President Donald Trump is returning Saturday to the site of his attempted assassination with a rally in Butler County.
item.dc:creator: Patty Coller, Fox 5
